name: linInvertMultipleRespBits
title: linInvertMultipleRespBits
syntax: dword linInvertMultipleRespBit(long frameID, dword byteIndices[],dword bitIndices[],dword numberOfDisturbedBits[], dword levels[], dword arrSize)
description: Inverts the multiple bits in specified locations in the next LIN header.

parameters.name: frameID
parameters.description: ID of the bus event to be manipulated.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
